title: write_verilog: Vivado transparent memory port regression

features.name: transparent memory read port with registered address
features.description: Code should include a memory array with a write port and a read port whose address is registered via an intermediate register before memory access, creating transparent read behavior

features.name: memory with rw_addr_collision attribute for Vivado
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration with the rw_addr_collision attribute set to yes, which is needed to suppress Vivado warnings for transparent read ports
